case_title: MAXSON ROY IND DBA MAXSON MOVING SERVICES INC VS JOHNSON BEVERLY MCELROY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,616.25 FILED BY MAXSON ROY IND DBA MAXSON MOVING SERVICES INC AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON BEVERLY MCELROY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
